WARNING: M1 board. Signal names use SERA/SIMETRA PMU convention. Some GPIO assignments differ from M2 (A2681).

power_enables.name: PPVAON_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 3V8 AON VR enable - gates PP3V8_AON from U5700. Delayed by D5340/D5345 circuit.

power_enables.name: P5VS2_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 5V S2 VR enable - gates PP5V_S2 from UC320

power_enables.name: P3V3S2_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 3V3 S2 VR enable - gates PP3V3_S2 from XMC710. Gating logic on page 37.
power_enables.source: PMU GPIO (moved to GPIOs that Sera PMU can 'hold' off)

power_enables.name: IPD_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: IPD power enable - gates all IPD load switches on page 40

power_enables.name: CHGR_AUX_OK
power_enables.description: Charger AUX OK - indicates charger is ready. Pulled up on page 24.

power_enables.name: PPVAON_PWR_EN_DD
power_enables.description: 3V8 AON power enable delayed version. From D5340/D5345 delay circuit.

power_good_fault.name: PMU_FAULT_INT_L
power_good_fault.description: PMU fault interrupt - indicates PMU error condition

power_good_fault.name: PMU_ACTIVE_READY
power_good_fault.description: PMU active ready - indicates MPMU has completed startup

power_good_fault.name: SPMU_READY
power_good_fault.description: SPMU ready signal from slave PMU

resets.name: PMU_RESET_L
resets.description: PMU reset line - master reset for MPMU

resets.name: SOC_HOLD_RESET
resets.description: SoC hold reset - from SoC support page

resets.name: SOC_K15_DFU_SELECT
resets.description: Force DFU mode - puts SoC into Device Firmware Update mode. R0536 pull-down.

resets.name: SOC_TESTMODE
resets.description: SoC test mode select. R0534 pull-down.

i2c_buses.name: I2C_SMC
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus - battery charger, power management

i2c_buses.name: I2C_SEEPROM_SCL/SDA
i2c_buses.description: SEP EEPROM I2C bus to U0500 (STOCT)

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC0
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF400 (CD3217 ATC0) firmware ROM

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC1
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF500 (CD3217 ATC1) firmware ROM

spi_buses.name: SOC_SPI_ROM
spi_buses.description: SoC SPI NOR interface to U1S75

boot_config.name: BOOT_CONFIG[2:0]
boot_config.description: Boot configuration via R0500-R0502. 000=SPI1 NOR (12MHz), 010=SPI0 NAND, etc.

boot_config.name: BOARD_ID[4:0]
boot_config.description: Board ID via R0510-R0514. Pulled to PP1V25_AWAKE_IO.

boot_config.name: BOARD_REV[3:0]
boot_config.description: Board revision via R0520-R0523. Stuffing resistor = 0.

sensor_adc.name: Sensors Power High Side
sensor_adc.description: Power high side sensors for system monitoring

thermal_sensors.name: Thermal Sensors
thermal_sensors.description: Board thermal sensors for PMU and SoC temperature monitoring
